basic_details.job_title: NEPA Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 36 DCS Operator, Shift Engineer and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Nepa Limited (A Govt. of India Undertaking)
basic_details.short_information: Nepa Limited, a Government of India Undertaking and pioneer newsprint manufacturing CPSU under the Ministry of Heavy Industries, has released Advertisement No. 04/2026 (dated 10 July 2026) inviting applications for 36 posts on contract basis. Vacancies span the Paper Machine, De-inking Plant, Power House, Instrument, Electrical, P&A, and Industrial Safety departments at the company's Nepanagar (Madhya Pradesh) unit. Eligible candidates can apply by email or post within 15 days of the advertisement's publication date.

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: Within 15 days of publication (candidates should apply well before this window closes; the notification does not print an exact calendar closing date)

age_limit.details: The upper age limit is a maximum of 50 years for all positions except Painter, which has a maximum age limit of 55 years. Age is reckoned as on 30 June 2026. Relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PwD/Ex-Servicemen candidates is as per Government Directives, and a certificate from the Competent Authority must be submitted with the application. OBC candidates belonging to the "Creamy Layer" are not entitled to OBC-NCL relaxation and must indicate their category as Unreserved (UR)/General.

post_wise_qualification.essential_qualification: Diploma in Pulp & Paper / B.A.Sc. in Pulp & Paper / Degree in (Chemical Engineering/Science) / BE (Mech.) / B.Sc. with relevant experience
BE/B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering/Chemical Technology/Pulp & Paper Technology
BE in Mech./Electrical/Instrumentation, OR Diploma in same, OR 1st Class Boiler Attendant License
BE in Mech./Electrical/Instrumentation, OR Diploma in same, OR First Class Boiler Attendant
BE/B.Tech. in Electrical or Electrical & Electronics Engineering/Electronic & Tele Communication, OR Diploma in same
MBA (HR)/MSW, OR PGDBM (2 years); LLB preferred; experience in HR Management preferably in Pulp & Paper Industry
Higher Secondary with Drawing and Painting subject

qualification.details: Essential qualification, experience, and age limit for all positions are reckoned as on 30 June 2026.

selection_process: Selection will be made through an interview of shortlisted candidates

conducted either online or physically. Merely fulfilling the eligibility criteria does not entitle a candidate to be called for interview - Nepa Limited reserves the right to raise the minimum eligibility standards to restrict the number of candidates called
in proportion to the number of vacancies. The company's decision in this regard is final
and it may increase or decrease the number of posts as per its requirement. No written examination or CBT is mentioned in the notification.
how_to_apply: Eligible candidates can apply through either of the following two methods:
By Email: Send the completed application in the prescribed proforma, along with self-attested copies of all supporting testimonials, to [email protected]

By Post: Send the completed application along with self-attested testimonials by Registered/Speed Post, in a sealed envelope superscribed "Application for the post of ___ & Sr. No. ___", to: Senior Manager (P&A) Nepa Limited, Nepanagar, Dist - Burhanpur Madhya Pradesh - 450221

Applications must reach the above address, or be emailed, within 15 days from the date of publication of the advertisement (10 July 2026). The company will not be responsible for postal delay or loss/non-delivery of the application.

content_sections.heading: Nepa Limited Recruitment 2026: Notification
content_sections.text: Download Nepa Limited Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF Here

rows.details: Nepa Limited (A Govt. of India Undertaking)

rows.date: Within 15 days of publication (candidates should apply well before this window closes; the notification does not print an exact calendar closing date)

content_sections.heading: Nepa Limited Recruitment 2026: Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: 36 vacancies are available across 14 positions, as follows:

content_sections.heading: Nepa Limited Recruitment 2026: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Essential qualification, experience, and age limit for all positions are reckoned as on 30 June 2026.

rows.qualification: Diploma in Pulp & Paper / B.A.Sc. in Pulp & Paper / Degree in (Chemical Engineering/Science) / BE (Mech.) / B.Sc. with relevant experience
rows.experience: Minimum 3 years in Paper Industry; preference for High Speed Paper Machine background
2 years (BE/B.Tech), 3 years (Diploma), or 4 years (B.Sc. CS) in Paper Machine background
Minimum 3 years in High Speed Paper Machine
Minimum 3 years as Back Tender in High Speed Paper Machine
Minimum 3 years as Winder Operator in High Speed Paper Machine

rows.qualification: BE/B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering/Chemical Technology/Pulp & Paper Technology
rows.experience: No bar - freshers may apply. Basic computer knowledge mandatory. Preference for De-inking Plant/wastepaper-based pulp/Newsprint industry exposure

rows.qualification: BE in Mech./Electrical/Instrumentation, OR Diploma in same, OR 1st Class Boiler Attendant License
rows.experience: 4 years (BE) / 6 years (Diploma) / 10 years, incl. 8 years AFBC Boiler ops (License), all requiring 10 MW+ power plant and Boiler & Turbine DCS experience. BOE Certificate preferred

rows.qualification: BE in Mech./Electrical/Instrumentation, OR Diploma in same, OR First Class Boiler Attendant
rows.experience: 3 years (BE) / 4 years (Diploma) / 4 years (License), all requiring 5 MW+ power plant AFBC Boiler DCS experience
Minimum 5 years in AFBC Boiler operations
3 years (Degree) / 4 years (Diploma); preference for prior Nepa Limited experience
3 years in relevant field; preference for prior Nepa Limited experience

rows.qualification: BE/B.Tech. in Electrical or Electrical & Electronics Engineering/Electronic & Tele Communication, OR Diploma in same
rows.experience: 2 years (BE/B.Tech) / 3 years (Diploma) in electrical maintenance in manufacturing industry, preferably Paper Industry

rows.qualification: MBA (HR)/MSW, OR PGDBM (2 years); LLB preferred; experience in HR Management preferably in Pulp & Paper Industry
rows.experience: Minimum 2 years in any organization; knowledge of Government Rules and Factory Acts; strong computer skills (presentations, Excel)

rows.qualification: Higher Secondary with Drawing and Painting subject
rows.experience: Minimum 2 years relevant painting experience at industries; preference for prior Nepa experience

content_sections.heading: Nepa Limited Recruitment 2026: Age Limit
content_sections.text: The upper age limit is a maximum of 50 years for all positions except Painter, which has a maximum age limit of 55 years. Age is reckoned as on 30 June 2026. Relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PwD/Ex-Servicemen candidates is as per Government Directives, and a certificate from the Competent Authority must be submitted with the application. OBC candidates belonging to the "Creamy Layer" are not entitled to OBC-NCL relaxation and must indicate their category as Unreserved (UR)/General.

content_sections.heading: Nepa Limited Recruitment 2026: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be made through an interview of shortlisted candidates, conducted either online or physically. Merely fulfilling the eligibility criteria does not entitle a candidate to be called for interview - Nepa Limited reserves the right to raise the minimum eligibility standards to restrict the number of candidates called, in proportion to the number of vacancies. The company's decision in this regard is final, and it may increase or decrease the number of posts as per its requirement. No written examination or CBT is mentioned in the notification.

content_sections.heading: Documents Required for Nepa Limited Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Application in the prescribed format, duly signed, with a latest passport-size photograph affixed Document in support of date of birth proof All certificates/testimonials for qualifications from matriculation onwards Caste certificate/PwD proof, as applicable Experience certificate/documents issued by the employer in support of the experience mentioned in the application form (candidature will be immediately rejected without this) NOC/forwarding letter, if currently employed in a PSU/Central/State/Semi-Government organization The envelope (for postal applications) must clearly mention "Application for the post of ___ & Sr. No. ___" - candidature will not be considered without this.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Nepa Limited Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Eligible candidates can apply through either of the following two methods: By Email: Send the completed application in the prescribed proforma, along with self-attested copies of all supporting testimonials, to [email protected] By Post: Send the completed application along with self-attested testimonials by Registered/Speed Post, in a sealed envelope superscribed "Application for the post of ___ & Sr. No. ___", to: Senior Manager (P&A) Nepa Limited, Nepanagar, Dist - Burhanpur Madhya Pradesh - 450221

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Nepa Limited Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted within 15 days from the date of publication of the advertisement, which is 10 July 2026. The notification does not print an exact calendar closing date, so candidates are advised to apply well within this window.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in Nepa Limited Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 36 vacancies across 14 positions in the Paper Machine, De-inking Plant, Power House, Instrument, Electrical, P&A, and Industrial Safety departments.

faq.question: Q3. How can I apply for Nepa Limited Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply either by emailing the completed application and self-attested documents to [email protected], or by sending them via Registered/Speed Post to the Senior Manager (P&A), Nepa Limited, Nepanagar.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for Nepa Limited Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 50 years for all posts except Painter, which has a maximum age limit of 55 years. Age is calculated as on 30 June 2026.

faq.question: Q5. Is this a permanent job at Nepa Limited?
faq.answer: No. All 14 positions under this notification are on contract basis, initially for 11 months, extendable based on performance and Company requirement. There is no representation for permanent appointment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for Nepa Limited Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is through an interview of shortlisted candidates, conducted either online or in person. No written exam is mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What documents are required for Nepa Limited Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates need date-of-birth proof, all qualification certificates from matriculation onwards, caste/PwD certificate (if applicable), an experience certificate from the employer, and an NOC/forwarding letter if currently employed in a PSU or Government organization.
